title: Cookie Smoke Bliss
description: A rich, crunchy, hangover-cure Argentinean dish featuring cookies, smoke, and a plant-based-friendly twist.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine oat cookies, cannabis extract (if using), coconut oil, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix until well combined.
Add almond flour gradually while continuously stirring with a spatula to prevent the dough from sticking.
Transfer the cookie dough into an even layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 10 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from oven and let it cool down completely before serving.
